Agent.Name: WeWork

Variable.Help: Get your webhook URL from a WeWork group robot.
Variable.Default: USE YOUR OWN WEBHOOK VALUE HERE

Variable.Help: Specify the fields which are included in the title of the notification.
Specify the fields which are included in the message body of the notification.

Agent.Script:
#!/bin/bash ############ {0} ############ TITLE=$(echo -e "$TITLE") MESSAGE=$(echo -e "$MESSAGE")
case "$IMPORTANCE" in normal) EMOJI="🔵" ;; warning) EMOJI="⚠️" ;; alert) EMOJI="🚨" ;; *) EMOJI="🔵" ;; esac
MD="## ${EMOJI} ${APP_NAME}\n> ${TITLE}"
if [ -n "$MESSAGE" ]; then MD="${MD}\n${MESSAGE}" fi
if [ -n "$LINK" ]; then MD="${MD}\n> [查看详情](${LINK})" fi
JSON=$(printf '%s' "$MD" | sed \ -e 's/\\/\\\\/g' \ -e 's/"/\\"/g' \ -e ':a' -e 'N' -e '$!ba' -e 's/\n/\\n/g')
curl -s -X POST \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d "{\"msgtype\":\"markdown_v2\",\"markdown_v2\":{\"content\":\"${JSON}\"}}" \ --connect-timeout 5 --max-time 10 \ "$WEBH_URL" > /dev/null 2>&1
exit 0
